title: daphne pampaninii
intro: Daphne pampaninii, also known as Himalayan daphne, is a shrub plant in the family Thymelaeaceae, native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, with medicinal compounds like daphnin and daphnetin found in its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Daphne pampaninii include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Daphne pampaninii include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
